title: Epinephrine
description:
Small QoL modpack based on Adenaline. Multiplayer friendly!

(Icon based on Adrenaline's)
body:
## About
This is a **small** QoL modpack based on Adrenaline. This modpack is multiplayer friendly, and should not get you banned (not guaranteed). This mod pack has 4 goals:

1. Be performant.
2. Be fast to update.
3. Improve QoL without changing the feel too much.
4. Consist of libre* mods only.


## Disclaimer
By using this modpack, [you agree to these disclaimers](https://rentry.co/epinephrine-mc-disclaimers).

## Multiplayer
"Toggle Accurate Placement" is bound to APOSTROPHE. Do NOT use Accurate Block Placement Reborn/SmartPlacement on competitive servers, or you will risk a ban! (Disable it with APOSTROPHE)

## Versioning
  - X is a mod list revision (addition/removal of a mod)
  - Y is the config revision (incremented every time a config tweak is added or changed)
  - Z is incremented when there's a version with only mod updates and little to no changes otherwise.

X.Y.Z is reset to 1.0.0 for every new MC release as different MC versions are very likely to have different mod sets available for them. (Taken from Simply Optimized's page)

## Appendix
I know there are way too many optimization + QoL modpacks, but I (a nobody) end up doing something like this when I install Adrenaline for the 1e7th time. Hopefully you enjoy it.

*Barring Sodium, which is under the PolyForm Shield License 1.0.0. The license allows you to do anything you want to the mod except to make a fork that "competes" with the original. I am not a fan of this and think it should be illegal because it is monopolistic in nature (see below for reasoning), but I must include it because otherwise the modpack would be very slow.

If you were looking for the section on the Sodium and Embeddium drama, [that has been moved elsewhere](https://rentry.co/regarding-sodium-embeddium).
